subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Beloved One Who hath caused the Sun of the Most Exalted Word to move from the horizon of the Tablet through the stirring of the Supreme Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که آفتاب کلمه علیا را از افق لوح بحرکت قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @high station of the true believer, @unity; oneness of humanity, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
